entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Which notification to use when – Workflow, Situation Handling, KPIs,
entry.content:
@StephanHeinberg Yes...  well observed... and there are good reasons for that...

1. With SAP S/4HANA we try to smooth the journey where we can in.  To minimize disruption, existing classic workflows are still supported in a system conversion scenario. 

2. My Inbox is one of very few SAP Fiori apps that can be used in both ECC and SAP S/4HANA.

3. Many of the Flexible Workflows that were written for SAP S/4HANA provide newly designed sub-tasks that work with My Inbox, support mobile devices, and lift the UI design overall. These can also be federated up to SAP Task Center.

4. SAP Task Center is considered the go-to unified inbox across multiple SAP Cloud solutions, and is definitely worth considering.

Custom Fields | SAP Help Portal

Creating Custom Fields | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: How to Enable Auto-Approval for Leaves of Three Days or Less
entry.content:
We need to configure different leave approval workflows in SuccessFactors based on employee levels. Additionally, we’d like to explore the possibility of auto-approving leave requests that are up to three consecutive days, without requiring manual approval. Managers would still be notified of such leaves.

Could you please confirm if this configuration is feasible in SuccessFactors? Also, what potential challenges or limitations should we be aware of when implementing this setup?

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements on CDS: filter values not visible
entry.content: I am facing the same issue. How did you resolve this?

entry.title: Re: Can anyone link me to Hana DB SQL queries documentati...
entry.content:
SQL dialect differs between different databases of different vendors. SAP HANA's compliance with the mandatory features of the ANSI SQL/2016 standard: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/4fe29514fd584807ac9f2a04f6754767/09940a1ed38c4ceb80770632997b286b.html?locale=en-US

In SAP HANA SQL, the DUMMY table is a special one-row, one-column table that is often used when a query requires a FROM clause but no actual table data is needed. It is similar to the DUAL table in Oracle.

Here are some common use cases for the DUMMY table:

  1. Selecting a Constant Value: When you want to return a constant value or perform a calculation that doesn't involve any table data, you can use the DUMMY table.

     
     
SELECT 'Hello, World!' AS greeting FROM DUMMY;

  • Calling Functions: When you need to call a function that doesn't require any table data.

     
     
SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS now FROM DUMMY;

entry.title: Sap Public Cloud - auto population of the Confirmation Control key(CCK) based on PO type/Plant
entry.content:
Hello all,

On SAP Public cloud, at purchase order creation, is it possible to have an auto population of the Confirmation Control key(CCK) based on PO type/Plant? This was possible on SAP on-premise via customizing point in SPRO. But this does not seem present in SAP public cloud. Any advice/BADI to achieve the auto determination of the CCK? Thanks

entry.title: How to activate Lean Catalog in SAP ECC?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are looking to use Lean Catalog for importing catalog data from suppliers into our SAP ECC and have some questions about the required steps and the functionality we can achieve.

Is Lean Catalog still a consulting add-on? If so, how do get to activate it?

Is Lean Catalog subject to separate licensing?

Are there any prerequisite SAP components that we need to have installed, like SRM?

From the documentation I can find, it looks as if Lean Catalog in current version can "survive" an upgrade to S/4HANA on premise. Is that correct?

Regards

Bodil Vestergaard

entry.title: S4 Hana on premise and BP 41V - Presales
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

we activated BP 41V in our S4 Hana on premise system and I have problem when creating folow-up documents for an opportunity. According to the script I should be able to create Sales Quotation (QT) as a follow-up document for Opportunity (OPPT). But when I click on icon for Follow-up I see only Activity types (see the attachment), Quotation is missing. Customizing is updated based on the Set-up document for 41V. Any advice how can I add additonal document types to the list of Follow-up documents?

Thanks 

Peter

entry.title: Promotion management using java SDK
entry.content:
Hey, I want to automate process of Promotion of Jobs using java SDK, I'm using 4.3 version, while using export Scenario to save file in my local directory 

package pm;
import com.crystaldecisions.sdk.exception.SDKException;
import com.crystaldecisions.sdk.framework.*;
import com.crystaldecisions.sdk.occa.infostore.*;
import com.businessobjects.lcm.job.IJob;
import com.businessobjects.lcm.utilities.LCMException;
import com.businessobjects.sdk.lcm.*;
import java.util.*;
public class ExportAndPersistJob {
    static String myCMS = "myCMS";
static String sourceCMS = "mySource";
// static String destinationCMS = "";
static String authType = "secEnterprise";
static String userName = "username";
static String password = "password";
    public static void main(String[] args) throws SDKException, LCMException {
        // Log on to the CMS
        ISessionMgr sessionMgr = CrystalEnterprise.getSessionMgr();
        IEnterpriseSession session = sessionMgr.logon(userName, password, myCMS, authType);
        session.setLocale(Locale.ENGLISH);
        // Create new host (job)
        Host host = HostFactory.newInstance(session);
        ExportScenario exportScenario = host.newExportScenario("SHRE_12testjob");
        
        // Log on to source CMS (could be same as host CMS)
        IEnterpriseSession sourceSession = sessionMgr.logon(userName, password, myCMS, authType);
        System.out.println("ran till here");
        LcmArchive exportArchive = LcmArchiveFactory.newInstance("C:\\Users\\test.lcmbiar");
        System.out.println("ran till here");
        exportScenario.setDestination(exportArchive);    
        exportScenario.setSource(session);
        String query = "SELECT * FROM CI_APPOBJECTS WHERE SI_CUID='sample'";
        ObjectBrowser browser = exportScenario.setSource(session);
        browser.addQuery(query);
        browser.computeDependencies(); 
        for (Set<IInfoObject> dependencySet : browser.getDependencies().values()) {
            browser.addObjects(dependencySet);
        }
        String result = exportScenario.schedule(password); 
        host.release();
        System.out.println("Job scheduled with ID: " + result);
        session.logoff();
        session.logoff();
    }
}
Ouput i got in terminal is 
Output is 

Logging on to the central CMS ...

Logged in to central as

Running housekeeping ...

Housekeeping complete

Creating job "SHRE_12testjob" ...

Job created

ran till here

ran till here

Logging on to the source CMS "" ...

Logged in to source as ""

Logging on to the source CMS ...

Logged in to source as

Running query on browser ...

Query returned 1 object(s)

Added 1 resource(s)

Computing dependencies ...

Dependencies computed

Added 1 resource(s)

Deleting job "SHRE_12testjob" ...

Job deleted

Saving job "SHRE_12testjob" ...

Job saved

Job "SHRE_12testjob" has been scheduled (Now)

Job scheduled with ID:

My doubt is why lcmbiar file is not exported to directory i gave? also why job is deleted?

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Decimal Issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

Field used for price input should format after input to localized decimal number.

As the value is given as Text preferred formula function would be Format_localized_decimal.

On binding this gives the error message of “This binding requires an inversible formula”.

See attached screenshot:

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: BAPI to remove ship-to from business partner
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is that any BAPI or FM to remove ship-to from the business partner?

Recently we have done upgrade S4 HANA. Earlier we use BDC to remove ship-to from the sold-to via XD02 t.code and works well. Now after upgrade we can't do via BDC. So, is that any BAPI or FM to achieve the case?

Thanks,

Dhina.

entry.title: Need confirmation for OS upgrade

We are currently planning an operating system upgrade from SUSE Linux Enterprise Server (SLES) 15 SP5 to SLES 15 SP6

  • Please let us know if the PO systems (Netweaver 7.5 SP29) and solution manager(7.2 SP14) version support the Linux version or not.

Regards,

Bhushan

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA approval using queries
entry.content:
Can anyone please guide me through approval stages in sap b1.I am using HANA dB.Currently I am implementing approval for purchase request.And I have udf field included in header table with valid values:PO and Good Issue.Currently if we link one approval stages with template(with 4 authorizers),it defaults to parallel approval where the approval document is sent to every users included in authorizers.So to simulate sequential authorization in such a way that only after first user approve,it will be forwarded to second approver based on value in Udf I have mentioned already,I have created stages each involving one approver and linked them all to one approval template.It should be like if value is PO,the approval should activate but if it is Good Issue,no approval needed.Here is my HANA approval query SELECT DISTINCT 'TRUE'

FROM DUMMY T0

WHERE $[OPRQ.U_PR_TYPE] = 'PO'.

Now the problem is it works for first approver ,but subsequent approval for approver 2,3 and 4 does not work.Can anyone help me how to get this right

entry.title: Re: Building a custom Digital Manufacturing Cloud POD Plugin the easy way
entry.content:
Hello Kevin, I hope this message finds you well.

I’ve been trying for a few weeks to develop a POD Plugin application. I'm stuck on a problems where I'm trying to use a plugin that consume a service in the S/4HANA. We configured a destination in the BTP connectivity services for the app we created. But we are not finding out a solution to consume that, we are allway getting errors that the destination is not founded.
I’ve tried using these resources without success: destination, Ajax, direct connection via the manifest and UI5.yaml.

We also tryed some git examples we found, but without any success. Can you help us on that?

My Best Regards,

Fernando Franco

entry.title: Re: Get technical information from Service Definition usi...
entry.content:
Hi ekalyvas,

I would say the easiest way is to send GET HTTP request to that service for metadata information:

e.g.

.../sap/opu/odata4/....zui_dasbcapaplace/0001/$metadata

In the answer there should be everything you need.

Regards

Jarda

entry.title: Re: HCM - Payroll Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

If you double-click the input table, it should show the values being submitted to rule XCM0.  It also may give you more details for the error.  It sounds like the Employee Group being passed to the rule is not being found in the rule.  But kind of hard to tell from the message.  By default, the rule is setup for Employee Groups 1, 2, 3 and a wildcard '*'.

entry.title: Re: Gender Dimension problem
entry.content: Just checked those 20 records and they seemed to be missing gender which is weird because it's mandatory. Anyways, the dimension works well. Thank you for the help.

entry.title: Stack Analytical Models
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Recently the feature to stack Analytical models (AM) has been released.


I already see two benefits:

- Data Access Control on first AM (with options to add more detailed DAC on second AM...) 

- Calculations managed on the first AM

 

I was wondering if there are other benefits/ calculations possible due to this new feature?

Would love to know how others see this feature (filtering, restrictions,..) .

 

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: EDI: Partner profile inbound not available Message no. E0337
entry.content:
Although this thread is medieval aI am posting a possible solution (cause I ran into the same issue and had to raise a case at SAP to get this resolved). I just paste the solution below:  ".....The problem is described in note 1776471 under section:

"One other very special case can be where key fields in the control record of the idoc actually matches the information in table EDP21. But the idoc still receives a status of 56. For the fields RCVPFC and SNDPFC we use in all dialogs the conversion form EDIPV (because the used domain is EDI_PARVW). On the database we don't save the value depending on the used language as there is a conversion exit behind that field so that you do not see the value that is stored on the database, but rather a language dependent one. On all dynpros you can insert 'VN' and before saving on the database this value will be converted to 'LF'. If you look at the entries then you see 'VN', but on the database you can find only 'LF'. If you send IDocs, then the fields RCVPFC and SNDPFC have to be filled with 'LF' instead of 'VN' to account for this. "....."

best regards, André

entry.title: Re: The Power of Joule for Developers, ABAP AI Capabilities
entry.content:

Note: I have updated My ADT and Eclipse to latest Version.

entry.title: Re: BAPI to remove ship-to from business partner

i would recommend using the class CMD_EI_API and methods like MAINTAIN or MAINTAIN_BAPI.

Jarda

entry.title: Re: Functional Area Hierarchy in Group Financial Statemen...
entry.content:
Hi Tomi.

The Best Practise way (and best way in my opinion) is to use Reporting rules to prepare your P&L by Function.

This way you can combine FS items with Subitems and define the Functional P&L that way.

The resulting P&L can be presentes in both Group Data Analysis reports and Review Booklet by selecting the appropriate Reporting Hierarchy.

Br.

Jan

Olga.

You can take a backup. It is upto you where you want to store it and make sure back up is stored in a secured place. 

https://api.sap.com/api/SecurityContent

entry.title: Re: Sap Public Cloud - auto population of the account ass...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

There’s a BADI called MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ACCOUNT that you can implement.

Here’s some elements to be considered and to take into account :

 

Use

This Business Add-In (BAdI) is used in the Purchasing (MM-PUR-PO) component.

You can use this BAdI to make changes to fields on account assignment level.

Using the BAdI you can change the following fields:

Fieldname on the User Interface Technical Name

G/L Account Number GLACCOUNT

Cost Center COSTCENTER
Profit Center PROFITCENTER

Network Number for Account Assignment PROJECTNETWORK

Work Breakdown Structure Element (WBS Element) WBSELEMENTINTERNALID

Main Asset Number MASTERFIXEDASSET

Sales and Distribution Document Number SALESORDER

Sales Document Item SALESORDERITEM

Unloading Point UNLOADINGPOINT

Controlling Area CONTROLLINGAREA

Functional Area FUNCTIONALAREA

Service Document Type SERVICEDOCUMENTTYPE

Service Document ID SERVICEDOCUMENTID

Service Document Item ID SERVICEDOCUMENTITEMID

Goods Recipient GOODSRECIPIENTNAME

Order Number ORDERID

Note: Use the technical name of the fields for the BAdI implementation. Ensure that you do not delete standard fields unless you want to delete them. Note that SAP may add new fields and do not use statements that change the overall structure.

 

The following fields are not changeable:

Fieldname on User Interface Technical Name

Purchasing Document Number PURCHASEORDER

Item number of Purchasing Document PURCHASEORDERITEM

Sequential Number of Account Assignment ACCOUNTASSIGNMENTNUMBER

Using the BAdI, you can raise messages by filling the changing parameter table MESSAGES.

 

Standard Settings

  • The BAdI is called for each account assignment line separately.
  • The BAdI is active in the standard system supplied.

 

Activities

For information about implementing BAdIs as part of the Enhancement Concept, see SAP Library for SAP NetWeaver under BAdIs - Embedding in the Enhancement Framework.

 

Example 1

Modify account assignment goodsrecipientname:

READ TABLE purorderaccount_table INDEX 1 ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_accountassignment>).

READ TABLE purchaseorderitem_table INDEX 1 ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_pur_item>).

IF <ls_accountassignment> IS ASSIGNED AND <ls_pur_item> IS ASSIGNED.

IF <ls_pur_item>-accountassignmentcategory = 'K'.

purchaseorderaccountchange-goodsrecipientname = 'Testuser'.

ENDIF.

ENDIF.

 

Example 2

Check if accountassignmentcategory field is initial and then raise an error message. Here a non-translatable message is raised:

IF <ls_pur_item>-accountassignmentcategory = ''.

ls_message-messagetype = 'E'.

ls_message-messagevariable1 = 'The accountassignementcategory
cannot be initial'.

ls_message-messageid = 'MEPO'.

ls_message-messagenumber = '250'.

APPEND ls_message TO messages.
ENDIF.

 

I hope this will be helpful for you.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Lease asset in S4 Hana - no interest posted
entry.content:
Dear community,

 

I an trying to set up leasing for some assets for my company but I can get the interest posted.

Here is the customizing I have done : 

- Create a depreciation key LEAS with ordinary depreciation + interest

- create new screen layout with leasing spreadsheet

- create new classes for leasign and assign the depreciation key + the screen layouts

- maintain the account determination including the interest accounts

- activate interests posting in OAYR

 

When creating an asset on these new class I fill all the data in the leasing spradsheet but when I try to post the depreciation I have not interest calculated when I was expected them to be calculated using the rate fielled in field LZINS

 

Does someone have any idea on what I may have missed please ? Or have I absolutely to to configure REFX ?

entry.title: OVP Cards with Mobile and Tablet
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’ve developed an OVP application that includes chart and table cards. The app functions perfectly on laptops and larger screens. However, I'm encountering some issues when accessing it on smaller devices such as tablets and mobile phones:

  • Dragging functionality does not work as expected; attempting to drag a card results in the card being deleted.

  • For the table card, only three columns are visible. There’s no option to drag or scroll to view the remaining columns.

Could you please advise on how to resolve these issues?

Best regards,

Abdul

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: @jcariajano great to meet you in the community. You have a valuable skillset, and I hope that you are enjoying your project work. Be sure to join other developers to engage. Wishing you the best. Application Development and Automation - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Hi Team,Open GR/IR balance migration tools in S/4 Han...
entry.content:
client's request is correct. Migrating PO with full Qty has the trail or track to audit the PO, and will not mess up PO related finance.

In your case that finance is not willing to clear GR/IR, then the solution with specific GL account directly in PO account assignment can't be taken. Because this solution needs more effort from finance.

Then I would propose to progress GR in new system, then reduce the corresponding stock.

DMC support new PO creation, for the history part, you just need to do GR after using DMC PO creation.

Kind Regards
Nidhi 
SAP Support

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Upgrade 2105 to 2205: Error when migrate data is sele...
entry.content: May i know the solution for this issue?

entry.title: Webinar: Configure-to-Order with ETO Special Requests across CPQ, Cideon Conify, CAD, S/4HANA AVC
entry.content:
While we have outlined the quote-to-cash end to end flow for configure-to-order across SAP CPQ, SAP Commerce Cloud, 3rd party applications, and SAP S/4HANA with Advanced Variant Configuration, in past sessions, in this webinar we would like to show you the end-to-end process for CTO+, including a detailed demo.

Please sign up here to join the webinar live, or review the recording later! 

The end-to-end Configure-to-Order Plus (CTO+) process enhances the traditional quote-to-cash cycle by accommodating both configured products and customer-specific engineering requests. It begins when a customer places an order for a configurable product that includes an additional Engineer-to-Order (ETO) requirement. SAP CPQ is used to configure the product, calculate pricing, costing, and margins, ensuring the offer is accurate and competitive. This front-end process may be supported by SAP Commerce Cloud or integrated third-party applications.

Once the configuration is completed, Cideon Conify automatically generates a CAD drawing of the configured product. This drawing is accessible directly from SAP CPQ and can be used for factory automation and virtual simulations in platforms like Nvidia Omniverse. If the customer requires additional engineering (ETO), the CAD drawing can be extended using SAP Engineering Control Center (ECTR) and the CAD system. Standard assemblies from the configured bill of materials (BOM) are reused, and new order-specific assemblies are created within the CAD environment.

After the engineering changes are finalized, the updated CAD data is transferred to SAP S/4HANA. This data forms an order-specific BOM, which is then released to production. The manufacturing process proceeds based on this customized BOM, ensuring that the final product meets the unique specifications requested by the customer. This integrated approach streamlines the handling of both standard and special orders within an integrated process and a high degree of automation.

entry.title: Re: I have a query in the SAP SAC, does it support Table...
entry.content:
Hello @ujjani 

I think what you show is a kind of "Trelli table" in Webi?

Unfortunately you would have to create your own tables, with specific filter selections.

Trelli works only with diagrams, see: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/use-chart-trellis-in-sap-analytics-cloud-story/ba-p/13563015

BR, Martin

entry.title: Chart_1.getDataSource().getDimensionFilters() not returning any values
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I got a heat map chart. Attached to chart is an input control for dimension profitcenter - multiple values.
Input control is only for that heatmap.

I need to determine if a filter is set on the profitcenter dimension (before executing another script).

I planned to use getDimensionFilters() with following code

var value = Chart_16.getDataSource().getDimensionFilters("Profitcenter")[0];

switch (value.type) {
    case FilterValueType.Single:
        var singleValue = cast(Type.SingleFilterValue, value);
        console.log(singleValue.value); // can access the 'value' property now
        break;
    case FilterValueType.Multiple:
        var multipleValue = cast(Type.MultipleFilterValue, value);
        console.log(multipleValue.values); // can access the 'values' property now
        break;
    case FilterValueType.Range:
        var rangeValue = cast(Type.RangeFilterValue, value);
        console.log(rangeValue.from); // can access the 'from' property now
        console.log(rangeValue.to);   // can access the 'to' property now
        // further range properties: 'less', 'lessOrEqual', 'greater', 'greaterOrEqual'
        break;
    default:
        break;
}

However, the array is always empty. No matter if dimension filter via the input control is set or not.

Is this function not working for charts? Or is there a general problem when the dimension is filtered via input control?

Thanks for all insights in advance!

Best regards
Axel

entry.title: Re: Profit Center Determination Error on FOC Sale Invoice...
entry.content:
Hello dear user, 

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Could you please provide a screenshot of the document splitting configuration (SSCUI 102322) ?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Handling Bank Charges During Incoming Payments in SAP...
entry.content:
Hi ru5,

that is a common challenge and their are at least two approaches to solve it.

  1. Forward amount of bank charge from electronic account statement to payment lot
    If you create the payment lot based on electronic account statement, add the charge amount to the payment amount in payment lot. In your example add 10,- to 100,- and post payment lot with 110,-. You have to take care that the difference is still posted on an expense account. Check exits 0950 following and follwing ones.
  2. Use tolerance group
    Set up tolerance group to 10,- and create a clearing variant used for clearing type incoming payments to make a full clearing considering the tolerance group. 

Kind Regards,

Tobias

entry.title: How to capture a Report for all the changes made to Work Order for Contingent Workers. SAP SF
entry.content:
Hello All-

My customer has asked me to generate a report for all the changes made in Work Order portlet for Contingent Workers. I have tried the below-

1- Uploaded the story report- SF_EMP_Contingent_Worker_Analysis_v2.0, But the problem is this report doesn't show all the minute changes made in work order by whom.  SF_EMP_Contingent_Worker_Analysis_v2.0.pdf

2- Tried Creating a Story Report with Employee details >> Job Info>> work order as objects , But even this report doesnt show the changes made.

3- Tried to generate a audit report >> Went to Create Configuration Data Report>> MDF Configuration Data > but no luck

4- Also Tried generating a table report with Person and employment audit as base object but CWK fields are not see,

 

Please tell me as how can i generate this report capturing all changes made in Work order.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello Everyone!!

I'm a Certified SAP SuccessFactors Compensation Consultant mostly working in Compensation, Variable Pay modules. 

Glad to be a part of this Community!!

Thank you

entry.title: Where can I learn how to use SAP IBP Time Series Based Constrained Supply Planning with Optimize ?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Mastering the supply optimizer in SAP IBP for Time-Series Based Constrained Supply Planning learning journey.
With the completion of this learning journey, you will be prepared for the certification C_S4CS. 

Learning Objectives
In this comprehensive course you will gain a solid understanding of the SAP IBP Time Series Based Supply Planning business processes using Optimizer, and their associated configuration.
DO NOT attempt to take this course without first completing the recommended courses for SAP IBP for Supply Chain Overview (IBP1010, IBP1020, IBP2200, IBP2400, IBP2500, IBP2600, IBP2700 & IBP2800), for Discovering the Main Configuration for SAP IBP (IBP2300) AND for SAP IBP Platform Features and Time Series Based Heuristics Planning (IBP3210 & IBP3220). If you attempt to take IBP3710 without first completing the mandatory prerequisite courses, you will not achieve the maximum benefits, and some concepts may be difficult to comprehend.​

Learning objectives
This course will prepare you to: 

  • ​Outline the features of SAP IBP Time Series Based Constrained Supply Planning with Optimizer  
  • Describe in detail: Modeling, Key Figures, and Parameters  
  • Utilize Operators and Optimizers 

Prerequisites
Essential: 

  • ​IBP1010 - Exploring Planning Processes in SAP IBP
  • IBP1020 - Exploring Tools & Features in SAP IBP
  • IBP2200 – Discovering SAP IBP for S&OP
  • IBP2300 –Discovering the Main Configuration for SAP IBP
  • IBP2400 - Discovering SAP IBP for Inventory Planning and Optimization
  • IBP2500 - Discovering SAP Supply Chain Control Tower  

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Commenting in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Bharath, 

Thank you for the detailed explanation.
I have a question regarding Datapoint Commenting in SAC:
Is it possible to retrieve comments made on the same data cells in SAC through SAP Analytics for Office (AfO)?
From my experience, I am unable to see the comments on data cells in SAP AfO, even though they are already saved in the SAP BW document store and I have selected the same query.


Could you please help explain the reasons for this, and let me know if there is a way to view these comments in AfO?


Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Profit Center Determination Error on FOC Sale Invoice...

entry.title: Release Navigator for SAP BTP - What's New in Q2 2025
entry.content:
The Release Navigator for SAP BTP continues to evolve and expand, offering our customers improved resources and streamlined access to product updates. As we step into Q2 2025, we are excited to announce the addition of 11 new product pages. Read more about the details in this blog post.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Collaborating closely with SAP BTP experts, we've expanded the release coverage by introducing 11 new product pages. These pages compile links to all available release information, such as schedules, pre- and post-release communications, blogs, and more:

  • SAP Audit Log Service
  • SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service
  • SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment
  • SAP Connectivity Service
  • SAP Credential Store
  • SAP Custom Domain Service
  • SAP Destination Service
  • SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
  • SAP Malware Scanning Service
  • SAP Private Link Service
  • SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI

You will notice that several of these pages share certain resources which are relevant across SAP BTP services that are relating to security.

Here's a glimpse at our new additions:

 

1. SAP Audit Log Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Audit Log service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Audit Log service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Audit Log service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

2. SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Audit Log service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Audit Log service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Audit Log service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out. 

 

3. SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment

This page contains specific resources for SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • Release Schedule in SAP Note
  • SAP Roadmap Explorer
  • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
  • SAP Community Tag
  • Documentation: SAP Help Portal

Check it out.

 

4. SAP Connectivity Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Connectivity service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Connectivity service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Connectivity service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

5. SAP Credential Store

This page contains specific resources for SAP Credential service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Credential service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Credential service
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

6. SAP Custom Domain Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Custom Domain service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Custom Domain service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Custom Domain service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

7. SAP Destination Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Destination service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Destination service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Destination service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

8. SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh

This page contains specific resources for SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center

Check it out.

Additionally, the page for SAP Integration Suite has been extended by release resources for its capability SAP Event Mesh. You can find the following newly added resources on this page:

  • SAP Event Mesh
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • SAP Community Page
    • SAP Community Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal

Check it out.

 

9. SAP Malware Scanning Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Malware Scanning service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Malware Scanning service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Malware Scanning service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out. 

 

10. SAP Private Link Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Private Link service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Private Link service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Private Link service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

11. SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI

This page contains specific resources for SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Roadmap Explorer
  • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
  • SAP Community Page
  • SAP Community Tag
  • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
  • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Discovery Center

Check it out.

 

Currently, the Release Navigator for SAP BTP proudly covers content for 41 products and services. See the full list below (underlined product pages have been added this update).

  • SAP AI Core
  • SAP AI Launchpad
  • SAP AI Services (incl. Data Attribute Recommendation, Document Information Extraction, Personalized Recommendation)
  • SAP Alert Notification
  • SAP Analytics Cloud
  • SAP Audit Log Service
  • SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service
  • SAP Automation Pilot
  • SAP BTP ABAP environment
  • SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment
  • SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
  • SAP Build
  • SAP Build Apps
  • SAP Build Code
  • SAP Build Process Automation
  • SAP Build Work Zone (advanced edition and standard edition)
  • SAP Business Application Studio
  • SAP Cloud Identity Services (incl. Authority Management, Identity Authentication, Identity Directory, Identity Provisioning)
  • SAP Cloud Transport Management
  • SAP Connectivity Service
  • SAP Content Agent Service
  • SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery
  • SAP Credential Store
  • SAP Custom Domain Service
  • SAP Datasphere
  • SAP Destination Service
  • SAP HANA Cloud
  • SAP Integration Suite
  • SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
  • SAP Malware Scanning Service
  • SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition
  • SAP Mobile Services
  • SAP Private Link Service
  • SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI
  • SAP Translation Hub

More pages dedicated to specific products and services are expected in future updates.

 

For centralized information regarding the release of new features for SAP BTP products and services, consult the Consolidated Release Schedule for SAP BTP. Regarding the Release Navigator updates, refer to this update plan:

*Disclaimer: The schedule is subject to alterations without notice, including potential delays or the integration of changes in subsequent update windows. It doesn't establish a commitment, promise, or legal duty to deliver any material, code, or functionality. Looking into the remaining quarters of 2025, updates will focus on quarterly content maintenance and a steady extension of product coverage. No substantial UI updates are planned for the time being.

 

The Readiness@Scale team within SAP Enterprise Support is driven to ensure release readiness across the SAP Enterprise Support portfolio. Our mission is to empower SAP customers to effectively adopt and utilize innovations.

If you have feedback or specific requests for content within the release navigator, feel free to contact us.

Don't forget to explore our team’s blogs tagged under Readiness@Scale.

Happy navigating!

Readiness@Scale  
SAP Enterprise Support

entry.title: Re: System Measurement. SAP Solution Manager 7.2 as the Central LAW System. Step-by-step guide.
entry.content: Before step 8, would it be possible to add a step with required role(s) for SLAW2 transaction ?

entry.title: Language set in BO OLAP connection doesn't work with DATASPHERE
entry.content:
Hi all,
in our organization we detect this problem:
1- we migrated a BO Webi from BW source (Bex) to  DATASPHERE source (Analytical Model)
2- the connection to Datasphere was set in  OLAP connection section and it works
2- in the OLAP connection the flag on "Save language" was inserted

4- the authentication in SSO (there are no other choices because SSO was set in DATASPHERE)
5- the webi report returns the data in the browser language (English) and doesn't consider the language set in the OLAP connection ( in our case Italian).
This also happens when scheduling the webi report or scheduling the publication  that has the webi report as its source.

The BO version is :
SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.3 Support Pack 4 Patch 8
Version: 14.3.4.5099

Any idea to solve it?

Anna M

entry.title: Re: VBAP-FONDS empty (SAP SD and SAP PSM)
entry.content: Check SAP note 1502432 to see whether you need to apply manual corrections as recommended in this note.

entry.title: Re: What are the free certification available for Consult...
entry.content:
Hi @Margit_Wagner, Good evening.

Just had a follow up question since you mentioned as a student, we get two exam attempts per year for free.

Can we attempt any of the below exams (twice per year)? Kindly confirm from your end.

Associate

  • C_TS4FI - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA for Financial Accounting Associates
  • C_TS4CO - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA for Management Accounting Associates
  • C_TS422 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Production Planning and Manufacturing
  • C_TS452 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement
  • C_TS462 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sales
  • C_TS410 - SAP Certified Application Associate - Business Process Integration
  • C_ACT_2403 - SAP Certified Associate - SAP Activate Project Manager
  • E_S4HCON - SAP Certified Technology Specialist - SAP S/4HANA Conversion and SAP System Upgrade
  • C_TS413 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Asset Management

Upskilling

  • C_TS450 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement

    Thanks in advance.

    Best Regards
    Arun

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: @StephanieMarley  Thanks you 😊

entry.title: Can OpenSSL in Crystal Reports 2025 be an install option or upgraded to OpenSSL 3.0.7 or later?
entry.content:
An Air Force client would like to use Crystal Reports 2025. A cybersecurity scan of the installation show the "libeaym64.dll" and "ssleaym64.dll" as vulnerable OpenSSL (1.0.2) shared library files. To mitigate this vulnerability,

1) Can the OpenSSL be a selectable install option? -OR-

2) Can the OpenSSL used be updated to OpenSSL 3.0.7 or later ?

Thanks for your assistance...

entry.title: Re: Duplicated invoice issue happened
entry.content: Hello SAP Community, did anyone get the solution to why one delivery is generating two invoices?

Unable to Populate SUN (Service User Number)Field in GB_CGI_XML_CT

entry.title: PPM Project Procurement integration
entry.content:
Hello EPPM Experts, 

I need to know if there is any fonctionnalities in PPM to have a visibility on Procurements actions for materials and equipements in terms of planning, availability ...etc.

Thanks in advance for your helps. 

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Populate SUN Field (Service User Number) in...
entry.content:
See help.sap.com documentation Configuring Payment Medium Formats 

See as referenced in same 

  1. To be able to fill out each field in the GB_BACS format, you can make settings in the following configuration activities:

    • Define User Number at Bank in Norway, United Kingdom, and Ireland (ID: 103132)

      In this configuration step, you define a user number at the bank per company code, country, and bank number.

    • Define Bank Transaction Code for United Kingdom (ID: 103131)

      In this configuration step, you define the bank transaction code for the customer/vendor and the bank transaction code for the house bank per country/region, payment method, and bank number.

    • Enter Name of Building Society (ID: 103133)

      In this configuration step, you enter the name of the building society for each bank or bank account.


      See 

      payment medium format GB_BACS

      This payment format defined by BACS is used for domestic direct debit and Bacs direct credit.

      Payments by BACS - SAP Documentation

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Really happy to join

entry.title: Re: Unable to Populate SUN Field (Service User Number) in...
entry.content:
See help.sap.com documentation Configuring Payment Medium Formats 

See as referenced in same 

  1. To be able to fill out each field in the GB_BACS format, you can make settings in the following configuration activities:

    • Define User Number at Bank in Norway, United Kingdom, and Ireland (ID: 103132)

      In this configuration step, you define a user number at the bank per company code, country, and bank number.

    • Define Bank Transaction Code for United Kingdom (ID: 103131)

      In this configuration step, you define the bank transaction code for the customer/vendor and the bank transaction code for the house bank per country/region, payment method, and bank number.

    • Enter Name of Building Society (ID: 103133)

      In this configuration step, you enter the name of the building society for each bank or bank account.


      See 

      payment medium format GB_BACS

      This payment format defined by BACS is used for domestic direct debit and Bacs direct credit.

      Payments by BACS - SAP Documentation

entry.title: Open Connectors via APIM:
entry.content:
1. Create an API Provider for Open connectors Service Now instance using Type “Open Connectors”

 

  1. Create a proxy using API provider created in step1

No policies created on API Proxy, as we are going to pass Authorization on header in postman

  1. Create a product & add API proxy to the product

  1. Create an application in developer HUB with product created in step3 & fetch APP key & Secret for authentication purpose.

 

Testing:

  1. Use the PROXY endpoint along with the resource path to call. Use the API key & secret as authentication. Use the authorization in header for Open connectors

  1. Get incidents from Open connector Instance of Service Now:

Try to fetch the same from Postman as well using the suffix part of the URL to call incidents resource (/incidents)

Regards,

Rohini Potham

entry.title: Re: Weighted interview questions
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes,You're correct that SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting doesn't natively support weighted scoring in the way your current system does.

However, there are alternative approaches and configurations within SuccessFactors that can help you achieve a similar outcome.

  1. Explore Pre-Screening Questions: Implement weighted pre-screening questions to capture essential qualifications early in the hiring process.
  2. Define Competencies: Clearly define competencies for each role and assign appropriate weights to reflect their importance.
  3. Customize Rating Scales: Develop custom rating scales that align with your organization's evaluation criteria.
  4. Utilize AI Insights: Leverage AI-assisted feedback tools to gain deeper insights into candidate evaluations.
  5. Consider Manual Calculations: Use external tools for complex calculations and reporting needs.

Hope this helps!! Please let me know if you need assistance on configuring these features within SF or developing custom reports.

Thanks,

kr,

karthick.

entry.title: Re: Calling a Remote Action from Event Handler in CAP Java
entry.content: As addition "Actions" for CAP Java are supported. https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#querying-api-features

entry.title: Re: how to configure bigquery equivalent datatypes in Pow...
entry.content:
I would recommend creating a copy of a database definition file and tailoring it to your needs.

Chris

entry.title: Re: Data Action - Place Dimension = # on the valid combin...
entry.content: Hi William_Yu! It worked by multiplying with ((RESULTLOOKUP()/RESULTLOOKUP())+1). Thanks!

entry.title: Customer Influence and Adoption for SAP FS-CD
entry.content:
Continuous Influence Sessions

Ideas and development requests can be submitted directly to SAP via various programs. SAP offers, for example, Continuous Influence Sessions.

User Groups

There are also other channels for influencing development, for example, through various user groups such as DSAG or ASUG. There are also product-specific user groups such as the FS-CD DACH User Group for German-speaking FS-CD users.

Creating a request via Continuous Influence Sessions

In this article, I will focus on Continuous Influence Sessions. To participate, you must register at Customer Influencer. The introductory pages contain helpful links to information on how these Continuous Influence Sessions work.

 

Unfortunately, the challenge here is that there is no dedicated session specifically for FS-CD. As a customer, you can only contribute your ideas to existing sessions.

As with many other SAP resources, it helps to know how SAP Collections and Disbursements for Insurance is used in SAP solutions. Firstly, it's based on the industry-neutral SAP Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable and is part of SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management . This means you can also search for sessions on these two solutions to submit ideas for FS-CD

Using the search function, you can then find a current session for BRIM and submit your cross-industry development requests there.

 

After submitting a development request, other users can vote for it.

 

It's a good idea to coordinate within the user groups to get as many votes as possible. Once a certain number of votes are received, the development request is reviewed by the respective product manager. This isn't a guarantee of implementation, but it is the first step toward a new feature.

entry.title: Country version Spain SEPA file
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We have extracted a SEPA file from the Starter system and we are getting a format error when uploading it into the bank. The file should be version pain.001.001.03 and the system generates a version pain.001.001.09 file.
Reviewing the SAP documentation for SPAIN we see that the CGI format we are using should output pain.001.001.03:

 

Asignación de formato de pago específico de país o región | SAP Help Portal

Asignación de formato de pago específico de país o región | SAP Help Portal


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Country version Spain SEPA file
entry.content:
Check the payment medium format used for payment.

See apps Manage Automatic Payments and Manage Payment medium 

 

See help.sap.com documentation 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a624a4a6d1d8473eb95fb42660127cfe/d6af5407b276477f9698f816e684ae27.html?locale=en-US&q=ES_CGI_XML_CT_V9

 

If payment medium format is used ES_CGI_XML_CT_V9. See version of pain referenced below. 

This payment format is a new version of the CGI format, it is version pain.001.001.09. It is available in addition to version pain.001.001.03.

entry.title: Re: What are the free certification available for Consult...
entry.content:
@David_Chaviano 
Can you please support @arymak87 inquiry?
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Concurrent Employment in Recruiting
entry.content: Since concurrent employments aren't supported in Recruiting solution, How are you currently managing internal career site access for employees with concurrent employment? Because, currently, when there is an application submitted through one of the employments, the employee loses access to the career site.

entry.title: Re: Resize of Group Tree does not work anymore
entry.content: Nice do you know the release date of SP338?

entry.title: Re: Country version Spain SEPA file
entry.content: See also Configuring Payment Medium Formats: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/031c345485b84c8c94265be9ef61d3a8/80b9cdd8bd1947a7a5d1bd2ec2894e4b.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Am I Prepared for the C_LCNC_2406 Exam? Looking for Final Tips!
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I'm getting ready to take the C_LCNC_2406 – SAP Certified Associate - Low-Code/No-Code Developer exam and would really appreciate some input from those who've been through it.

Here's what my prep looks like so far:

  • Completed BTP100 & BTP110 (Citizen Development fundamentals)
  • Finished APP400, SPA400, and WZ400 courses
  • Gained hands-on experience with SAP Build Apps, Process Automation, and Work Zone
  • Scored around 70–75% on mock tests
  • Using P2PCerts practice questions, which have been helpful for understanding the format and question style

Based on your experience, does this sound like solid prep?
Are there any key topics I should review again or any additional resources you’d recommend?

Thanks in advance for any tips or insights — especially from those who’ve passed recently!

entry.title: Re: how to access to the additional data provided by an o...
entry.content:
Hi User 116,

The data capture during ADC is only visible to the Onboardee during capture. If you want to expose it, you have two options.

  1. Generate documentation as per the suggested answer and distribute that to a responsible group.
  2. Generate a Story Report that populates the required data.

Regards

Frans

entry.title: Re: BAPI to remove ship-to from business partner
entry.content: As you already migrated to S/4HANA look at class CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN method MAINTAIN
